headline: Gen Digital Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Gen Digital (NASDAQ:GEN) reported what executives described as its strongest fiscal year in a decade, driven by growth in both its core consumer cybersecurity business and an expanding portfolio of trust-based solutions that includes identity protection, financial wellness, and a growing marketplace
